mapper.select:
select kc.*,kv.original_filename,kv.version_no,kd.status as documentStatus from knowledge_chunk kc LEFT JOIN knowledge_document_version kv on kc.version_id = kv.id left join knowledge_document kd on kc.document_id = kd.id
kv.del_flag = 0 and kc.del_flag = 0
and (kv.original_filename like CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') or kv.version_no like CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
order by kc.created_at desc
